RE-ADJUDICATION REQUEST
Batch: BAT-2026-NB-00004295-OT  |  Period: 01-02-2026 - 28-02-2026

CLAIM DETAILS:
  Bundle ID:          8356cfdd-062d-4343-8cb6-00048da8f418
  Transaction ID:     6629418
  Patient NID:        2538864592
  Claim Type:         professional / op
  Encounter Class:    AMB
  Policy Number:      1050006933
  Policy Holder:      شركة العدد العربية للتجارة
  Net Amount:         SAR 412.95

REJECTION DETAILS:
  [AD-1-4] – 1 service(s) rejected:
    • 25/02/2026 | B01391 – SERUM URIC ACID

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (AD-1-4):
  DIAGNOSIS-SERVICE ALIGNMENT APPEAL: The diagnosis codes have been reviewed and corrected to accurately reflect the clinical picture. The corrected ICD-10 codes are consistent with the service provided. We request re-adjudication with the updated coding.
  Supporting Documents: Updated clinical notes with correct ICD-10 codes, treatment rationale

  [BE-1-4] – 1 service(s) rejected:
    • 25/02/2026 | N00005 – CONSULTATION FEE (CONSULTANT)

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (BE-1-4):
  PREAUTHORIZATION APPEAL: The service was provided without prior authorization due to clinical urgency / administrative oversight. We hereby submit a retroactive preauthorization request with full clinical justification as required under ART PreAuth Protocol – General Requirements. All supporting clinical documentation is attached.
  Supporting Documents: Medical report, clinical notes, diagnosis confirmation, treatment plan

  [MN-1-1] – 4 service(s) rejected:
    • 25/02/2026 | B00113 – ALANINE AMINOTRANSFERASE (ALT/SGPT)
    • 25/02/2026 | B01389 – SERUM TOTAL BILIRUBIN (T.BIL)
    • 25/02/2026 | B01369 – SERUM ALBUMIN
    • 25/02/2026 | B00244 – ASPARTATE AMINOTRANSFERASE (AST/SGOT)

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (MN-1-1):
  CLINICAL JUSTIFICATION APPEAL: The service is clinically justified as evidenced by the attached medical records, diagnosis codes, and clinical pathway documentation. The service aligns with accepted Clinical Practice Guidelines (CPG) and was medically necessary.
  Supporting Documents: Lab results, clinical notes, CPG reference, medical necessity letter
